wave_number.Description: The experimental cohort or batch that the animal was processed in.

litter_id.Description: Unique identifier for the litter the animal was born into, used to control for sibling effects.

puberty_onset_age_days.Description: Age in days at the onset of puberty, defined by the day of vaginal opening or prepuce separation.

date_of_birth.Description: Exact calendar date of birth (ISO8601 format).

date_of_puberty.Description: Exact calendar date of puberty onset (ISO8601 format).
